description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push to tags matching 'v*' or the master branch. Run a windows-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, determines if the workflow is running for a tag, sets up MSBuild, and builds a solution for Win32, x64, and ARM64 platforms. Create an installer and pack artifacts if running for a tag. Upload the setup and artifacts, create a release, and upload the release binary and symbols if running for a tag.
